# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Write secure code.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/application",
    "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.0",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-curl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('.env')) { copy('.env.example', '.env'); echo 'Environment file created\\n'; }\"",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@setup-permissions",
            "@run-setup-script"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@run-update-script"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "@php -r \"$dirs = ['storage/logs', 'storage/cache', 'storage/uploads', 'public/assets']; foreach ($dirs as $dir) { if (!is_dir($dir)) { mkdir($dir, 0755, true); echo 'Created: ' . $dir . '\\n'; } }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('storage/logs/.gitkeep')) { touch('storage/logs/.gitkeep'); }\""
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "setup-permissions": [
            "@php -r \"$dirs = ['storage', 'bootstrap/cache']; foreach ($dirs as $dir) { if (is_dir($dir) && strtoupper(substr(PHP_OS, 0, 3)) !== 'WIN') { chmod($dir, 0775); echo 'Permissions set for: ' . $dir . '\\n'; } }\""
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php"
        ],
        "run-setup-script": [
            "@php scripts/setup.php"
        ],
        "run-update-script": [
            "@php scripts/update.php"
        ],
        "post-autoload-dump": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Autoload files generated successfully\\n';\""
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup-directories": "Create required application directories",
        "download-assets": "Download required assets from secure sources",
        "compile-assets": "Compile and optimize application assets",
        "setup-permissions": "Set proper file permissions",
        "clear-cache": "Clear application cache",
        "run-setup-script": "Execute initial setup script",
        "run-update-script": "Execute update script"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "*": false
        },
        "process-timeout": 600
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
